## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff check`, `ruff format`)
- [ ] Type checks pass (`mypy`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Migrations are present if schema changed (`makemigrations`)
- [ ] No new secrets or hardcoded credentials
- [ ] No `console.log` / `print` left in code
- [ ] PR targets the correct branch (`main`)
